overall.description: A static atmospheric shot from a modern high-rise apartment bedroom overlooking a rainy, foggy cyberpunk cityscape. The scene features a large bed with warm interior lighting contrasting against the cool, hazy exterior visible through floor-to-ceiling windows, characteristic of game engine footage from a futuristic urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern high-rise bedroom with panoramic rainy city view

agents.ego_description: stationary in the bedroom, observing the rainy cityscape through the windows

entered.detail: modern platform bed with white sheets and pillows, bathed in warm yellow interior lighting
tall panoramic windows with rain droplets revealing foggy cityscape outside
dense urban skyline with tall buildings obscured by heavy rain and atmospheric fog
tall palm tree visible through the window against the grey stormy sky
black spherical device on a stand positioned near the window
wooden wall-mounted panel with warm backlighting on the left side
transparent glass partition separating the sleeping area from the rest of the apartment

segments.scene_description: A completely static shot of a futuristic bedroom interior. The camera faces a large bed with white linens illuminated by warm interior light, while floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape with a prominent palm tree visible through the haze. The spherical air purifier stands near the window as rain streaks down the glass, creating a cozy, atmospheric mood with no movement or action occurring throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a futuristic bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a warm interior and a cold, rainy cityscape. It begins focused on a large bed with white linens, bathed in soft interior light that creates a cozy sanctuary. As the eye moves toward the perimeter of the room, the scene opens to floor-to-ceiling windows where rain streaks down the glass, blurring the view of a hazy cyberpunk metropolis. The perspective then settles on the intersection of these two worlds, highlighting a spherical air purifier standing beside a prominent palm tree visible through the mist.
